Timing Values: Minimum expiration time


In this test, the minimal applied expiration time is tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

  • (ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.
  • (Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.
  • (Exec)-Block:
    1. Starts ventilation.
    2. Waits for 20 seconds.
    3. Stores one measurment of the expiration time measured by the Flow-Analyser in the variable [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER]
      4. .
  • (Scripting)-Block:
    1. Multiplies the value stored in [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER] by a factor of 1000.
      2. Note: The value is multiplied due to insufficient capabilities of AIT to evaluate floating-point numbers.
  • (Evaluation)-Block:
    1. Evaluates the applied expiration time stored in [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER]
  • (CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
